description: Fetch a Bitbucket Cloud pull request by repository and id. Set include_comments to also GET /pullrequests/{id}/comments (paged). Optional page/pagelen are Bitbucket Cloud pagination params when include_comments is true.

pull_request_id.description: Pull request id (numeric id in the Bitbucket Cloud URL / REST API).

include_comments.description: When true, also fetch comments for this pull request (paged JSON with values, page, pagelen, next).

page.description: Page number for comments when include_comments is true.

pagelen.description: Page size for comments when include_comments is true.
